notes: frozen (agent_supports=no): mistral-vibe 2.19.0 subagents (Task tool) run synchronously in-process — Task.run() awaits subagent_loop.act(...) to completion before yielding TaskResult, and TaskArgs has no run_in_background/detached param, so the parent cannot reach end_turn while a child is alive; the scenario's distinguishing observable cannot be elicited. No spec phases.
